en.extract:
The Sinai rosefinch (Carpodacus synoicus) is a species of finch in the family Fringillidae. The male has a pink face and breast with a whitish forehead and crown and the female is pale gray-brown overall with a whitish belly. It is found in the Sinai Peninsula and the Negev region of the Middle East, within the borders of Egypt, Israel, Jordan, and Saudi Arabia. Its natural habitat is hot deserts. The pale rosefinch is sometimes considered a subspecies. It is the national bird of Jordan.


Jordan's national bird
The Sinai rosefinch was chosen as Jordan's national bird due to its similarity in color to the red sandstone on Petra.

The '''Sinai rosefinch''' (''Carpodacus synoicus'') is a species of [[finch]] in the family [[Fringillidae]].<ref>{{Cite web |title=Carpodacus synoicus (Sinai Rosefinch) - Avibase |url=https://avibase.bsc-eoc.org/species.jsp?avibaseid=8F36D66332487994 |access-date=2025-07-21 |website=avibase.bsc-eoc.org}}</ref> The male has a pink face and breast with a whitish forehead and crown and the female is pale gray-brown overall with a whitish belly.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Sinai Rosefinch - eBird |url=https://ebird.org/species/sinros1 |access-date=2025-07-21 |website=ebird.org |language=en}}</ref> It is found in the [[Sinai Peninsula]] and the [[Negev]] region of the Middle East, within the borders of [[Egypt]], [[Israel]], [[Jordan]], and [[Saudi Arabia]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is hot [[desert]]s. The [[pale rosefinch]] is sometimes considered a [[subspecies]]. It is the national bird of Jordan.
[[File:Sinai Rosefinch (Carpodacus synoicus) in Israel.jpg|left|thumb|Sinai Rosefinch in [[Israel]]]]

== Jordan's national bird ==
The Sinai rosefinch was chosen as Jordan's national bird due to its similarity in color to the red sandstone on Petra.<ref>{{Cite web |date=2022-12-26 |title=National bird featured on new JD1 bill |url=https://www.jordannews.jo/Section-109/News/National-bird-featured-on-new-JD1-bill-26079 |access-date=2025-07-21 |website=Jordan News |language=en}}</ref>

zh.extract:
西沙色朱雀（台湾作西奈淡色朱雀）（学名：Carpodacus synoicus），是雀形目燕雀科的一种鸟类。


特征
西沙色朱雀体重约20.8克，翼长约83.9毫米，嘴峰长约11.7毫米，喙宽度约6.3毫米，喙厚度约7.9毫米，跗蹠长约18.5毫米，尾长约66毫米。西沙色朱雀在其分布区内为留鸟，食性为草食性。


分布
荒漠地表、裸露干燥石砾地区、稀疏散在灌木的山谷和丘陵草地。该物种的模式产地在埃及西奈半岛。西奈半岛。
